titleStmt.title: SII 20.233: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 233. (B.K. No. 119 of 1935-36.) BANAVĀSI, SIRSI TALUK, NORTH KANARA DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab fixed in the south prākāra in the Madhukēśvara temple.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated Śaka 1354, Pramādi, the other details being lost. The cyclic year Pramādi coincided not with Śaka 1354 but 1355. Śaka 1354 corresponded to A.D. 1432-33.

The inscription seems to record a gift of land made to Mallaṇṇa, son of Rāyaṇṇa who died in a fight with the robbers when the latter looted the Madhukēśvara temple, when Mallaṇṇa, son of Chikkidēva, called Tribhuvana-Bharatāchārya was holding some office at Banavase and Mahāpradhāna Bayicha-daṇṇāyaka was governing Gōve and Guttiya-Vēṇṭhe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśira(ḥ)ścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śvara śrī vīrapratāpa vijeyapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru hastināvatiya
rājyaṁgaḷa dharmmaṁgaḷa pratipālisuttamippa kāladalū śrīmma(ṁ)nmahāpradhāna bayicedaṇṇā
ḍeyarū gōve guttiya vēṁṭheyavanū Āḷutipa kāladalū svasti śrījayaṁttī puravarādhī
pādapadmārādhakarumappa tribhuvanabharatācāriya rāyarājaguru (ya) maṁḍalācā
ḷumapa banavaseya cikkadēva Oḍeyara kumāra mallaṁṇa Āyyagaḷū banavaseya sthānadā
māḍikoṁḍu sukhadiṁdahali . śrī madhukanāthadēvara Amrutapaḍige salutipa

saṟasūṟeyanū koṁḍu hōguttiralāgi mallaṁṇa Ayyaṁgaḷa taruvakkaḷa Araga
ṁṇna nāyakana maga kāṇuva baḷiya nāyaṁṇnanāyakanu naraūra dēvana haḷeya nā ya
koṁḍu svasti śrī jayādbhudaya śakavaruṣa 1354 neya pramūdīca saṁva
dēvara pādava kūḍidanu Ā rāyaṁṇnanāykana maga mallaṁṇnage
varu banavaseya sonnaligeya balla Oḷagaṇna hiryaūra diseya hattu
vāgi pālisi baheU svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁddharā ṣa
jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
